summary: Gangseo delivered a DPK sweep across all 3 subdistricts (갑 58.55, 을 54.84, 병 59.13). The 2023 Gangseo 을 by-election — which DPK won by a wide margin — was widely read as mid-term preview; the 2024 general election extended the pattern.

issues.label: National mood / 2023 harbinger
issues.description: Per wiki-22-ko: 2023 Gangseo 을 by-election was treated as a mid-term preview; 2024 confirmed the pattern.

issues.label: Mixed residential base
issues.description: Balanced residential mix without strong class-profile skew.

issues.label: Magok redevelopment effect
issues.description: Newer Magok developments add commuter-professional base; directional impact unclear.
